'''√r-ch-d''' ('''karachad''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:culvert|culvert]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| r-ch-d
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:culvert|culvert]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| √r-ch-d
|-
! Lemma
| karachad
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || thirachad || jirachad || shirachad || kirachad
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || thuthurachad || jujurachad || shushurachad || kukurachad
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || thurachad || jurachad || shurachad || kurachad
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || thurachad || jurachad || shurachad || kurachad
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || therachad || jerachad || sherachad || kerachad
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || thothorachad || jojorachad || shoshorachad || kokorachad
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || thorachad || jorachad || shorachad || korachad
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || thorachad || jorachad || shorachad || korachad
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || rachad || rachad || rachad || rachad
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || rachad || rachad || rachad || rachad
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || rachad || rachad || rachad || rachad
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || rachad || rachad || rachad || rachad
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || thærachad || jærachad || shærachad || kærachad
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || thatharachad || jajarachad || shasharachad || kakarachad
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || tharachad || jarachad || sharachad || karachad
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || tharachad || jarachad || sharachad || karachad
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || sharachad
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || gosharachad
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || gokisharachad
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || sharachadnü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || gosharachadnknü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || gokisharachadnü
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || sharachadshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || gosharachadnkshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || gokisharachadshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || sharachadro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || gosharachadnkro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || gokisharachadro
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || sharachadmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || gosharachadnkmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || gokisharachadmu
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || sharachadsher
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || gosharachadnksher
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || gokisharachadsher
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || sharachadng
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || gosharachadnkng
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || gokisharachadng
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || sharachadya
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || gosharachadnkya
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || gokisharachadya
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || sharachadyam
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || gosharachadnkyam
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || gokisharachadyam
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || sharachadnüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || gosharachadnknüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || gokisharachadnüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || sharachadnüro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || gosharachadnknüro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || gokisharachadnüro
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || sharachadnümu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || gosharachadnknümu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || gokisharachadnümu
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || sharachadshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || gosharachadnkshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || gokisharachadshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || sharachadshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || gosharachadnkshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || gokisharachadshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || sharachadshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || gosharachadnkshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || gokisharachadshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || sharachadronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || gosharachadnkronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || gokisharachadronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || sharachadroshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || gosharachadnkroshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || gokisharachadroshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || sharachadromu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || gosharachadnkromu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || gokisharachadromu
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || sharachadmunü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || gosharachadnkmunü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || gokisharachadmunü
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || sharachadmushë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || gosharachadnkmushë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || gokisharachadmushë
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || sharachadmuro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || gosharachadnkmuro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || gokisharachadmuro
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|cb332aa}}
